Operation.xpath: Defs/RecipeDef[ defName="MEXY_Synthetizing_GravilatticeAlloy" or defName="MEXY_Synthetizing_GravilatticeSilk" or defName="MEXY_Synthetizing_PsycholuxCrystal" or defName="MEXY_Synthetizing_OverloadCrystal" or defName="MEXY_Synthetizing_OracleCrystal" or defName="MEXY_Synthetizing_MiracleCrystal" or ]/recipeUsers
Defs/ThingDef[ defName="MEXY_Aetherim_Judicator" or defName="MEXY_Annihilation_Storm" or defName="MEXY_SanctisSigil" ]/recipeMaker/recipeUsers

Defs/ThingDef[ defName="MEXY_Luxplume_Array" or defName="MEXY_Psyonic_Tuner" or defName="MEXY_CognitiveDelugeRegulator" or defName="MEXY_ShieldCore_Melee" or defName="MEXY_ShieldCore_Ranged" or defName="MEXY_Space_Folder_I" or defName="MEXY_Space_Folder_II" or defName="MEXY_Space_Folder_III" ]/recipeMaker
